experienceQuestions.question: Created business intelligence dashboards using Tableau/Power BI?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Developed high-impact, interactive dashboards in Tableau, enabling executives to visualize metrics that reduced operating costs by 15%.

experienceQuestions.question: Automated manual data-extraction or ETL pipelines saving staff time?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Automated core data-extraction and ETL pipelines in Python and SQL, saving team members 15+ hours of manual analysis every week.

experienceQuestions.question: Trained predictive models to forecast metrics or churn scores?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Trained and deployed a gradient-boosted churn prediction model in Python, achieving 93% accuracy in predicting customer renewal rates.

experienceQuestions.question: Optimized database query speeds reducing compute overhead?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Refactored slow SQL queries and structured view indexing, cutting database server execution times by 35%.

experienceQuestions.question: Conducted funnel analyses to identify purchase bottlenecks?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Analyzed customer conversion steps in GA4, identifying 2 key dropout nodes to improve final purchase rates by 12%.

experienceQuestions.question: Structured recurring KPI reports saving leadership review hours?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Compiled automated weekly performance metrics summaries, saving operations leads 8 report hours per cycle.

projectQuestions.question: Wrote SELECT and JOIN queries to extract project data?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Drafted PostgreSQL query statements utilizing JOIN structures to compile unified customer transaction profiles.

projectQuestions.question: Designed visualization sheets or filters in Tableau?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Designed interactive visual maps and metric filters in Tableau sheets, detailing geographic customer distributions.

projectQuestions.question: Wrote Pandas scripts to clean missing data values?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Developed Python scripts utilizing Pandas dataframes to impute missing fields in raw csv datasets.

projectQuestions.question: Configured scheduled jobs or tasks to update database tables?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Structured cron parameters to trigger automated data refresh updates every midnight.

projectQuestions.question: Created pivot tables or chart logs in Excel?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Engineered pivot tables and dynamic chart views in Excel worksheets, illustrating metric correlations.

projectQuestions.question: Configured dataset relationships or schemas in Power BI?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Structured relational schema connections across 5 SQL tables inside Power BI models.
